Don’t forget to bring your friends, your energy, and your best senyuman!
Let’s celebrate Raya the FCA way — see you tonight!

Gong Xi Fa Cai! 🧧✨
 The celebration begins because this semester’s FCA Screening Week is finally here!

With the theme of Chinese New Year, we’re bringing luck, lights, and legendary student films to the big screen 🎬🐉
Join us from 23 February 2026 until 27 February 2026 at MMU Cinema.
 Clear your schedule, bring your friends, and let’s welcome prosperity with stories worth watching.

See you there and May this screening bring you nothing but good vibes and great films! 🍊✨

It's here! It's here! This semester's FCA Screening Week is finally here!👻 Clear your schedule for this week and experience our students' films from February 24th until the 28th!😈🤘 

But wait! Do stick around for the Awards Night, themed Goth☠️, wear your best attire and impress the skull out of your friends!😜

Posters by @x.shaf

#fca #cinematicartsociety #filmstudent #screeningweek

Voting day is here! Cinematic Arts Society intends to end the Presidential Race with a proper, student led - election!

Come in to the lounge and representatives will walk you through the process of casting in your votes! 🗳️ 

We’d like you guys to keep in mind that the power is in YOUR hands as the student. Showing up to vote means  giving in your support for the party that will be your student body representatives for the coming term! ✊

Your vote matters!

Be Heard, Be the Change.

#fcammu #CAS #cinematicartsociety #townhall #presidentialrace #students #voting #election

And finally, to close this week is the long awaited Awards Night. We have watched great films made by the students creativity and passion these past 5 days 🗣️🙌🏼 

Can't wait to see what else they have in store for us next semester 🥂 

#fcammu #mmumalaysia #filmschool #filemmalaysia #awardsnight

caption:
You’ve waited long enough! Voting day has arrived and this will officially determine who will be the next Cinematic Arts Society President! 👨‍✈️

It’s been incredibly exciting to see all the candidates and cabinet members put in their effort to campaign for the Presidential Race. We hope you got to know the candidates a little bit better and see their different visions for the future of CAS. ✨

When: Friday, 20th December, 2pm - 6pm
Where: FCA Student Lounge, Classroom B

Your vote matters!

Be Heard, Be the Change.

#fcammu #CAS #cinematicartsociety #townhall #presidentialrace #students #voting #election

PRESIDENTIAL CANDIDATE: ADAM KHALIL

“FREAKS AND GEEKS. 
Do you trust FCA in the hands of these people?“

Be Heard, Be the Change. 

#fcammu #CAS #cinematicartsociety #townhall #presidentialrace #students #meetthecandidates

Your vote matters! The Presidential Race, brought to you by CAS.

Be Heard, Be the Change.

It's that time of the semester again, the FCA Welcoming Party is back!🥳 Everyone are invited to the celebration this Friday, themed Back to School!😆 We are also goin to do an award ceremony for our Dean's Listers👌 So, go back to your closet and pull out your best school gear👔 and celebrate the bond between us and enjoy the festivities with us this Friday!🤘 (no, we're not forcing you😀🔪).

Date: 29 November 2024
Venue: FCA Student Lounge
Time: 8:00 pm -10:30 pm
Theme: Back to School

Can't wait to see you!👋

#fca #cinematicartsociety #welcomingparty #filmstudent #mmu #fcammu

Thank you so much to everyone that attended Town Hall 1 !!! This is a monumental and historic day in FCA as it is the very first time we’ve ever done anything like it. 

The session briefed fellow students of FCA on the introduction of the Town Hall initiative as well as the new Presidential Race for @cinematicartssociety. 

Following that, we had an interactive open session where we heard from you, the students, about your concerns, grievances as well as suggestions for FCA and CAS. 
We look forward to a new tradition and direction in FCA upon the commencement of Town Hall 1. One that involves the students’ inputs for the betterment of our learning environment. 

Be Heard, Be the Change. 

#fcammu #CAS #cinematicartsociety #townhall #presidentialrace #students

PRESIDENTIAL CANDIDATE: FIRHANA IEESHAH

“Vote for us to ensure progress, innovation, and a brighter future for FCA🤩🤩 Together, we can achieve new dreams and create lasting change for FCA‼️‼️“

Be Heard, Be the Change. 

#fcammu #CAS #cinematicartsociety #townhall #presidentialrace #students #meetthecandidates

PRESIDENTIAL CANDIDATE: CEBU

“These are our promises, with your help, we hope to make these promises into a reality.“

Be Heard, Be the Change. 

#fcammu #CAS #cinematicartsociety #townhall #presidentialrace #students #meetthecandidates

PRESIDENTIAL CANDIDATE: CEBU

“The world is scary, harsh and cruel. We hope CAS can be the place where you can stand with your own two feet.“

Be Heard, Be the Change. 

#fcammu #CAS #cinematicartsociety #townhall #presidentialrace #students #meetthecandidates

PRESIDENTIAL CANDIDATE: FIRHANA IEESHAH

“Curious to see who your presidential candidates are🤔 ❓Here’s our team who you’ve probably seen around more than you think. 😉”

Be Heard, Be the Change. 

#fcammu #CAS #cinematicartsociety #townhall #presidentialrace #students #meetthecandidates

PRESIDENTIAL CANDIDATE: CEBU

“This is our cabinet, some of you might already know who we are. But for those who doesn’t, they are the most kind-hearted and cooperative people. We disagree with each other a lot but our ability to still work together is the reason why we are a team.“

Be Heard, Be the Change. 

#fcammu #CAS #cinematicartsociety #townhall #presidentialrace #students #meetthecandidates
